nodes.name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Wrap
nodes.description: name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Wrap | short_description: Tofu with mixed vegetables in curry sauce served with rice; a protein-rich, veggie-forward plant-based meal with a citrus-inspired fres
nodes.premise: Meal: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Wrap - name: Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Wrap | short_description: Tofu with mixed vegetables in curry sauce served with rice; a protein-rich, veggie-forward plant-based meal with a citrus-inspired fresh note. | meal_suggestion: To boost fiber, swap white rice for brown rice or quinoa. Opt for a low-sodium curry sauce and add a side of leafy greens for extra volume and micronutrients. A squeeze of lemon or lime can enhance the citrus freshness mentioned in the name. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich tofu provides plant-based protein; fiber from vegetables and rice supports fullness. Carbohydrates mainly come from rice. Depending on the curry sauce, sodium and added sugars may be high; check for dairy and gluten content if you have sensitivities.

nodes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Wrap
nodes.description: name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Wrap | short_description: Stuffed bell peppers filled with lean ground turkey, rice, and tomato sauce, topped with cheddar for a savory, protein-rich dish. |
nodes.premise: Meal: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Wrap - name: Stuffed Bell Peppers — Citrus Fresh Wrap | short_description: Stuffed bell peppers filled with lean ground turkey, rice, and tomato sauce, topped with cheddar for a savory, protein-rich dish. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a bright citrus side salad (greens with orange or lemon vinaigrette) to fit the Citrus Fresh Wrap theme, and consider swapping in brown rice and reduced-fat cheese for extra fiber and lower fat. | nutrition_note: Lean ground turkey provides protein; peppers and rice contribute fiber and carbohydrates; cheddar adds calcium and fat; tomato sauce supplies lycopene. Overall a balanced meal with protein, fiber, and modest fat. For a lighter version, use lean turkey, brown rice, and low-sodium sauce.

nodes.name: Baked Cod Plate — Lemon-Herb Skillet
nodes.description: name: Baked Cod Plate — Lemon-Herb Skillet | short_description: Baked cod with lemon-herb flavor, served with roasted sweet potato and broccoli for a light, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Bake cod
nodes.premise: Meal: Baked Cod Plate — Lemon-Herb Skillet - name: Baked Cod Plate — Lemon-Herb Skillet | short_description: Baked cod with lemon-herb flavor, served with roasted sweet potato and broccoli for a light, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Bake cod and vegetables in a lemon-herb skillet; 25–30 minutes total. Pair with a small portion of quinoa or brown rice for extra whole grains, and a drizzle of olive oil if desired. | nutrition_note: Lean cod provides high-quality protein with low fat; sweet potato and broccoli add fiber, vitamins A, C, and K, and minerals. Lemon adds vitamin C and fresh flavor. Balanced plate with protein, complex carbs, and vegetables.
